source: local procedural 224x160 Stardew-style business buildings; no external downloads or image-generation credits

agent_barracks.note: Agent Barracks: worker roster, Agency Agents sync, and spawned-worker visibility.

revenue_vault.note: Bank / Model-Cost Building: revenue targets, gold, and model-cost discipline.

outreach_tower.note: Outreach Office: compliant lead batch and outreach preparation only; no sending.

operations_foundation.note: Fulfillment Workshop: delivery SOPs, QA, and automation handoffs.

client_hall.note: Client Success Hall: retention, support, and reporting workflows.

market.note: Market Board: business purchase / opportunity board using public/free research.
